UnitAbilities.Title: Self Repair
UnitAbilities.Text: At the start of your Command phase, this model regains 1 lost wound.

UnitAbilities.Title: Evade and Survive
UnitAbilities.Text: In your opponent's Movement phase, when an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move within 8" of this model, if this model is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move.

UnitAbilities.Title: Backroom Deals
UnitAbilities.Text: If your army contains one or more units with this ability, during the Declare Battle Formations step, select one of those units. While the selected unit is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Infiltrators ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Warrant of Trade
UnitAbilities.Text: If your army includes one or more units with this ability, after both players have deployed their armies, select up to D3 Imperium Battleline units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

UnitAbilities.Title: Backroom Deals
UnitAbilities.Text: If your army contains one or more units with this ability, during the Declare Battle Formations step, select one of those units. While the selected unit is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Infiltrators ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Warrant of Trade
UnitAbilities.Text: If your army includes one or more units with this ability, after both players have deployed their armies, select up to D3 Imperium Battleline units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

UnitAbilities.Title: Grim Spectres
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. That enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from the result when doing so.

Options: Inquisitorial melee weapon, storm bolter, psychic gifts and psychic shock wave

UnitAbilities.Title: Authority of the Inquisition
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, it can embark within any Transport that its Bodyguard unit can embark within.

UnitAbilities.Title: Power of the Rosette
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time you target this model’s unit with a Stratagem, roll one D6: on a 3+, you gain 1CP.

UnitAbilities.Title: Blessed Wardings
UnitAbilities.Text: While the bearer is leading a unit, models in that unit have a 6+ invulnerable save.

UnitAbilities.Title: Psychic Gifts
UnitAbilities.Text: The bearer has the Psyker keyword.

UnitAbilities.Title: Throne of Judgement (Aura)
UnitAbilities.Text: While a friendly unit is within 6" of this model, improve the Leadership characteristic of models in that unit by 1. While an enemy unit is within 6" of this model, worsen the Leadership characteristic of models in that unit by 1.

UnitAbilities.Title: Unsubtle Crusader
UnitAbilities.Text: At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, you can select up to three Agents of the Imperium Infantry units from your army, or one Imperium Battleline unit from your army – those units gain the Scouts 6" ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Authority of the Inquisition
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, it can embark within any Transport that its Bodyguard unit can embark within.

UnitAbilities.Title: Malus Codicium
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, double the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by Daemonhost models in that unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Dominate Will (Psychic)
UnitAbilities.Text: At the start of your opponent’s Shooting phase, select one enemy Infantry unit that is within 12" of and visible to this model and roll one D6: on a 1, this model suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 2-5, until the end of the phase, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll; on a 6, until the end of the phase, that unit is not eligible to shoot.

Weapons.Name: Mind Assault
Weapons.Keywords: DEVASTATING WOUNDS, PRECISION, PSYCHIC, SUSTAINED HITS 1

UnitAbilities.Title: Catechism of Death
UnitAbilities.Text: While this unit contains Chaplain Cassius, melee weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Unflinching
UnitAbilities.Text: You can re-roll Battle-shock tests for this unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Jump Pack
UnitAbilities.Text: The bearer has a Move characteristic of 12" and can move over models and terrain as if they were not there.

UnitAbilities.Title: Psychic Hood
UnitAbilities.Text: Models in the bearer’s unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against Psychic Attacks.

UnitAbilities.Title: Kill Team
UnitAbilities.Text:
Each time an attack targets this unit, if it contains models with different Toughness characteristics, until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, use the Toughness characteristic of the majority of the models in that unit when determining what roll is required for that attack to successfully wound. If two or more Toughness characteristics are tied for majority, use the highest value.

For the purposes of determining which models in this unit can embark within a Transport, Kill Team Terminator models, Kill Team Outrider models, Kill Team Biker models and models equipped with a jump pack each take up the space of 2 models, but can otherwise embark within any Transport their unit can embark within, even though similar models in other units have the Terminator, Mounted or Jump Pack keywords.

For the purposes of interacting with terrain features, all models in units with this ability are considered Infantry models, even though similar models in other units may have the Mounted or Jump Pack keywords.

Designer’s Note: While the abstractions in the above rule cause some models to behave differently to similar models in other units, they are designed to minimise complicated movement, Transport and Benefit of Cover rules.

Options: cyclone missile launcher and storm bolter

UnitAbilities.Title: Terminatus Assault
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this unit ends a Charge move, each enemy unit within Engagement Range of this unit must take a Battle-shock test.

UnitAbilities.Title: Teleport Homer
UnitAbilities.Text: At the start of the battle, you can set up one Teleport Homer token for this unit anywhere on the battlefield that is not in your opponent’s deployment zone. If you do, once per battle, you can target this unit with the Rapid Ingress Stratagem for 0CP, but when resolving that Stratagem, you must set this unit up within 3" of that token and not within 8" of any enemy models. That token is then removed.

UnitAbilities.Title: Storm Shield
UnitAbilities.Text: The bearer has a Wounds characteristic of 4.

Infos.Title: ATTACHED UNIT
Infos.Text: If a Character from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to a Deathwatch Kill Team, it can be attached to this unit instead.

UnitAbilities.Title: Turbo-boost
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in this unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Astartes Shield
UnitAbilities.Text: The bearer has a 4+ invulnerable save.

Options: Long Vigil melee weapon and Astartes shield

UnitAbilities.Title: Indomitor Doctrines
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll if this unit is below its Starting Strength, and add 1 to the Wound roll as well if this unit is Below Half-strength.

UnitAbilities.Text: At the end of your opponent’s turn, if this unit is more than 6" away from all enemy units, you can remove this unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

UnitAbilities.Text: Models in the bearer’s unit have the Feel No Pain 6+ ability.

Infos.Title: ATTACHED UNIT
Infos.Text: If a Character from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to an Deathwatch Kill Team, it can be attached to this unit instead.

Infos.Title: TRANSPORT
Infos.Text: This unit cannot embark within an Imperial Rhino.

UnitAbilities.Title: Malefic Warding
UnitAbilities.Text: While an Inquisitor model is leading a unit that includes one or more Daemonhost models, models in that unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.

UnitAbilities.Title: Bound Daemon
UnitAbilities.Text: While an Inquisitor model is leading a unit that includes one or more Daemonhost models, the Objective Control characteristic of Daemonhost models in that unit is 1.

LeaderInfo.Description: At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, this unit can join one Inquisitorial Agents unit from your army that is being led by an Inquisitor model (a unit cannot have more than one Daemonhost unit joined to it). If it does, until the end of the battle, every model in this unit counts as being part of that Bodyguard unit, and that Bodyguard unit’s Starting Strength is increased accordingly.

UnitAbilities.Title: Inconceivable Augmentation
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: A Weaponsmith, Not a Warlord
UnitAbilities.Text: This model cannot be selected to be your Warlord. While an Inquisitor model is leading a unit that includes one or more Jokaero Weaponsmith models, the Objective Control characteristic of Jokaero Weaponsmith models in that unit is 1.

LeaderInfo.Description: You can attach this model to an Inquisitorial Agents unit, even if one Inquisitor unit has already been attached to it. If you do, and that Bodyguard unit is destroyed, the Leader units attached to it become separate units, with their original Starting Strengths.

Infos.Title: INQUISITORIAL AGENT
Infos.Text: If your Army Faction is not Agents of the Imperium, then for each unique pairing of 1 Inquisitorial Agents unit and 1 Jokaero Weaponsmith unit occuring in your army, increase the maximum number of Character units permitted in your army by 1.

UnitAbilities.Title: Ward Against the Malefic Arts
UnitAbilities.Text: While this unit is leading a unit, each time a Psychic Attack targets that unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll and subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Vox-cast Proclamations (Aura)
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time your opponent targets a unit from their army with a Stratagem, if that unit is within 12" of this unit’s Inquisitor Ostromandeus model, increase the cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP.

UnitAbilities.Title: Authority of the Inquisition
UnitAbilities.Text: While this unit is leading a unit, it can embark within any Transport that its Bodyguard unit can embark within.

UnitAbilities.Title: Vox-skull
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, you can select one enemy unit (excluding Monsters and Vehicles) within 12" of the bearer. That unit must take a Battle-shock test; if that test is failed, until the end of your next turn, that unit cannot have the Benefit of Cover.

UnitAbilities.Title: Designer’s Note
UnitAbilities.Text: Place a vox-skull token next to the unit, removing it once this ability has been used.

UnitAbilities.Title: Moment of Glory
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle, in the Fight phase, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, improve the Strength and Attacks characteristics of melee weapons equipped by this model by 3.

UnitAbilities.Title: Ordo Hereticus
UnitAbilities.Text: Add the Ordo Hereticus and Inquisitor keywords. Add to the list of units Martial Agent models can be attached to: Exaction Squad, Imperium Battleline, Imperial Navy Breachers, Inquisitorial Agents, Sisters of Battle Squad, Subductor Squad, Vigilant Squad.

UnitAbilities.Title: Ordo Malleus
UnitAbilities.Text: Add the Ordo Malleus and Inquisitor keywords. Add to the list of units Martial Agent models can be attached to: Exaction Squad, Grey Knights Terminator Squad, Imperium Battleline, Imperial Navy Breachers, Inquisitorial Agents, Subductor Squad, Vigilant Squad.

UnitAbilities.Title: Ordo Xenos
UnitAbilities.Text: Add the Ordo Xenos and Inquisitor keywords. Add to the list of units Martial Agent models can be attached to: Deathwatch Kill Team, Exaction Squad, Imperium Battleline, Imperial Navy Breachers, Inquisitorial Agents, Subductor Squad, Vigilant Squad.

UnitAbilities.Title: Rogue Trader
UnitAbilities.Text: Add the Voidfarers and Rogue Trader keywords. Add to the list of units Martial Agent models can be attached to: Imperial Navy Breachers, Voidsmen-at-Arms.

UnitAbilities.Title: High-handed Authority
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, it can embark within any Transport that its Bodyguard unit can embark within.

UnitAbilities.Title: Backroom Deals
UnitAbilities.Text: (Rogue Trader only): While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Infiltrators ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Holy Hatred
UnitAbilities.Text: Melee weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Nowhere to Hide
UnitAbilities.Text: Ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Oracular Gifts
UnitAbilities.Text: (Inquisitor only): This model has the Psyker keyword. Enemy units that are set up on the battlefield as Reinforcements cannot be set up within 12" of this model.

UnitAbilities.Title: Termination
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets a unit that is Below Half-strength, add 1 to the Hit roll.
